item.title: Scientists compared dinosaurs to mammals for decades but missed this key difference
item.description: Baby dinosaurs weren’t coddled like lion cubs or elephant calves—they were more like prehistoric latchkey kids. New research suggests that young dinos...

item.title: Apollo rocks reveal the Moon had brief bursts of super-strong magnetism
item.description: Scientists at the University of Oxford have finally settled a decades-long mystery about the Moon’s magnetic field — and it turns out both sides were ...

item.title: Hidden architecture inside cellular droplets opens new targets for cancer and ALS

item.title: Ireland’s Old Irish Goat has survived 3,000 years
item.description: The Old Irish Goat isn’t just part of folklore — it’s genetically linked to goats that lived in Ireland 3,000 years ago. Scientists analyzed ancient r...

item.title: PFAS found in most americans linked to rapid biological aging
item.description: “Forever chemicals” known as PFAS have quietly infiltrated everything from nonstick pans to food packaging—and now new research suggests some of them ...
